R

readProducts() - Method in class Persistance.ProductApiDAO
Reads product data from the API and converts it into an ArrayList of Product objects.
readProducts() - Method in interface Persistance.ProductDAO
Reads product data from the JSON file and converts it into an ArrayList of Product objects.
readProducts() - Method in class Persistance.ProductJsonDAO
Reads product data from the JSON file and converts it into an ArrayList of Product objects.
readShops() - Method in class Persistance.ShopApiDAO
Reads shop data from the API, converts the API response to a list of Shop objects, and returns the list.
readShops() - Method in interface Persistance.ShopDAO
Reads shop data from the storage and converts it into an ArrayList of Shop objects.
readShops() - Method in class Persistance.ShopJsonDAO
Reads shop data from the JSON file and converts it into an ArrayList of Shop objects.
removeCartProducts() - Method in class Business.CartManager
Removes all products from the shopping cart.
removeProductFromAllShops(String) - Method in class Business.ShopManager
Removes a product from the catalogue of all shops.
removeProductFromCart(String, String) - Method in class Business.CartManager
Removes a product from the cart based on the product and shop name.
removeProductFromShop(String, String) - Method in class Business.ShopManager
Removes a product from the catalogue of a specific shop.
removeProducts() - Method in class Business.Cart
Removes all products from the shopping cart.
run() - Method in class Presentation.Controller
Runs the main program, initializing necessary components and presenting the main menu to the user.
